definition:
θεραπεύω 
 [in LXX for יָשַׁב, etc. ;] 
  1. to do service, serve: with accusative of person(s), pass., Act.17:25. 
   2. As medical term, to treat (MM, Exp., xv), cure, heal: Mat.12:10, Mrk.6:5, Luk.6:7, al.; with accusative of person(s), Mat.4:24, Mrk.1:34, al.; before ἀπό, Luk.5:15 6:18 7:21 8:2, 43; θ. νόσον (μαλακίαν), Mat.4:23, al 
 SYN: ἰάομαι (see Field, Notes, 60; MM, Exp., l.with) 
 (AS)
